programme.title: Best Games Ever: 1994 PF GEE v NM
programme.desc: The 90s, the decade that delivered. There would be three new teams, for the first time non-Victorian clubs would take premiership honours and it was a decade of goalkicking maestros Dunstall, Ablett and Lockett.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 2003 R17 BRI v PA
programme.desc: The 2000s - a decade where Brisbane and Geelong ruled the roost and an era of Brown, Judd and Ablett.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 2011 R18 FRE v WC
programme.desc: The 2010s - With two new teams, a drawn grand final and plenty of new talent, it was certainly a decade of spellbinding AFL football.

programme.title: Grand Final Classics: 2001 GF BRI v ESS

programme.title: AFL Thrillers: R3 2007 CAR v ESS
programme.desc: When the Blues and the Bombers renewed their rivalry in 2007, there was always going to be extra spice in the game. With only 7 points in it at the final change, Brendan Fevola lit up the MCG in a cliffhanger finish.

programme.title: AFL Thrillers: R20 2005 MEL v GEE
programme.desc: When the Demons travelled to Kardinia Park, no-one gave them a chance. But livewire forward Russell Robertson dragged his side over the line in a thrilling upset in a 30 Minute Thriller.

programme.title: Game of the Year: 2004 PF PA v STK
programme.desc: AFL has produced many memorable games over it's history, Fox Footy have narrowed it down to the best game of each year.

programme.title: Incredible Comebacks: 2000 R7 PA v ADE
